creators.bio: transmissions from the dead frame buffer.
found footage // analog decay // VHS rituals.

videos.creator: glitchtape
videos.title: DEAD FRAME // 001
videos.description: First transmission from the broken loop. Captured during a tape rewind error.

videos.creator: concrete_eye
videos.title: CONCRETE STUDY # 14
videos.description: Documentation of a post-war housing block. Static framing, no voice-over.

videos.creator: voidsignal
videos.title: TERMINAL // ECHO
videos.description: CRT flicker on a forgotten boot screen. 30 seconds of phosphor decay.

videos.creator: concrete_eye
videos.title: FOG / NULL
videos.description: Slow pan through a foggy treeline at first light. Minimal cut.

videos.creator: glitchtape
videos.title: NOISE FIELD // 003
videos.description: Pure RGB noise sourced from a damaged capture card.

videos.creator: voidsignal
videos.title: NEON DECAY
videos.description: Wet asphalt, neon reflections, slow dolly forward. Cyberpunk reference plate.

videos.creator: concrete_eye
videos.title: WALL — 1968
videos.description: Texture study of a poured-concrete facade. Long take, locked tripod.

videos.creator: glitchtape
videos.title: VHS RITUAL
videos.description: VHS-to-VHS-to-VHS dub. Each generation strips more signal.

videos.creator: voidsignal
videos.title: BUFFER OVERFLOW
videos.description: Time-lapse of a terminal-only code editor session. No music.

videos.creator: glitchtape
videos.title: TIDE / LOOP
videos.description: Single wave breaking, slowed 4x. Background plate for installation work.

videos.creator: voidsignal
videos.title: BODY // SIGNAL
videos.description: Performer in a black-box studio under a single hard light.

videos.creator: concrete_eye
videos.title: STAIRWELL DESCENT
videos.description: Handheld descent down a brutalist stairwell. Six floors, no cuts.

videos.creator: voidsignal
videos.title: RAIN PROTOCOL
videos.description: Falling glyph rain rendered from a terminal log replay.

videos.creator: glitchtape
videos.title: SPOTLIGHT // 09
videos.description: Spotlight passes across an empty stage. Sound design only, no narrative.
